resources.string: GuitarTuner processes microphone audio locally for tuning only.

string-array.name: privacy_points
string-array.item: Audio is analyzed on this device while the tuner is visible.
Audio samples are not saved, exported, or uploaded.
The app declares microphone permission only and has no network permission.
Startup tuning preferences stay on this device until app data is cleared or the app is uninstalled.
